title: Generational Group Advises P&C Investments, LLC dba Perfection Industrial Finishing in its Sale to Madison Lake Capital
summary: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Generational Group, a leading mergers and acquisitions advisory firm for privately held businesses, is pleased to announce the sale of P&C Investments, LLC dba Perfection Industrial Finishing to Madison Lake Capital. The acquisition closed April 10, 2026. Headquartered in Tucson, Arizona, Perfection Industrial Finishing is a provider of high-quality metal finishing services serving aerospace, defense, industrial, and commercial markets.
